free_text: Charge-particle spectra-90 MeV protons on Al-27,Ni-58,
spectra of Al-27,Ni-58,Zr-90 and Bi-209 were measured
The p, d, t, 3He, and alpha particles
were identified by deltaE-E and time-of-flight (TOF)
techniques over the energy range from a few MeV-up to
the maximum kinematically allowed energies. A total
of four events (one TOF and three deltaE-E) was used
to cover the entire energy range.
The uncertainty for the experimental data
BP:  added DOI, information to the method
023-046 were updated to new date formats,lower case.
STATUS was added in Subents 002-047, E-MIN was swapped
with DATA col. in Subents 002-026. REL-REF update.
PART-DET deleted from Subent 001. Data in Subent 318
